name: MeshTopologyEdgeList
summary: Represents an entry point to the list of edges in a mesh topology.

methods.name: CollapseEdge
methods.summary: Replaces a mesh edge with a vertex at its center and update adjacent faces as needed.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge in TopologyEdges.

methods.name: EdgeLine
methods.summary: Gets the 3d line along an edge.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: The topology edge index.

returns.doc: Line along edge. If input is not valid, an Invalid Line is returned.

methods.name: GetConnectedFaces(Int32)
methods.summary: Gets indices of faces connected to an edge.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge that is queried.

returns.doc: An array of face indices the edge borders. This might be empty on error.

methods.name: GetConnectedFaces(Int32, Boolean[])
methods.signature: public int[] GetConnectedFaces(int topologyEdgeIndex, out bool[] faceOrientationMatchesEdgeDirection)
methods.summary: Gets indices of faces connected to an edge.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge that is queried.

params.name: faceOrientationMatchesEdgeDirection
params.doc: An array of Boolean values that explains whether each face direction matches the direction of the specified edge.

returns.doc: An array of face indices the edge borders. This might be empty on error.

methods.name: GetEdgeIndex
methods.signature: public int GetEdgeIndex(int topologyVertex1, int topologyVertex2)
methods.summary: Returns index of edge that connects topological vertices. returns -1 if no edge is found.

params.name: topologyVertex1
params.doc: The first topology vertex index.

params.name: topologyVertex2
params.doc: The second topology vertex index.

methods.name: GetEdgesForFace(Int32)
methods.summary: Gets indices of edges that surround a given face.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: A face index.

returns.doc: A new array of indices to the topological edges that are connected with the specified face.

methods.name: GetEdgesForFace(Int32, Boolean[])
methods.signature: public int[] GetEdgesForFace(int faceIndex, out bool[] sameOrientation)
methods.summary: Gets indices of edges that surround a given face.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: A face index.

params.name: sameOrientation
params.doc: Same length as returned edge index array. For each edge, the sameOrientation value tells you if the edge orientation matches the face orientation (true), or is reversed (false) compared to it.

returns.doc: A new array of indices to the topological edges that are connected with the specified face.

methods.name: GetTopologyVertices
methods.summary: Gets the two topology vertices for a given topology edge.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge.

returns.doc: The pair of vertex indices the edge connects.

methods.name: IsEdgeUnwelded
methods.summary: Determines if the mesh edge is unwelded, or if the mesh faces that share the edge have unique vertex indices.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge in TopologyEdges.

returns.doc: true if the edge is unwelded, false if the edge is welded.

methods.name: IsHidden
methods.summary: Returns true if the topological edge is hidden. The mesh topology edge is hidden only if either of its mesh topology vertices is hidden.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge in TopologyEdges.

returns.doc: true if mesh topology edge is hidden.

methods.name: IsNgonInterior
methods.summary: Returns true if the topological edge is an interior ngon edge

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge in TopologyEdges.

returns.doc: true if mesh topology edge is an interior ngon edge.

methods.name: IsSwappableEdge
methods.summary: Determines if a mesh edge index is valid input for SwapEdge(Int32).

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge in TopologyEdges.

returns.doc: true if edge can be swapped.

methods.name: SplitEdge(Int32, Point3d)
methods.signature: public bool SplitEdge(int topologyEdgeIndex, Point3d point)
methods.summary: Divides a mesh edge to create two or more triangles

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: Edge to divide

params.name: point
params.doc: Location to perform the split

methods.name: SplitEdge(Int32, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SplitEdge(int topologyEdgeIndex, double t)
methods.summary: Divides a mesh edge to create two or more triangles

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: Edge to divide

params.name: t
params.doc: Parameter along edge. This is the same as getting an EdgeLine and calling PointAt(t) on that line

methods.name: SwapEdge
methods.summary: If the edge is shared by two triangular face, then the edge is swapped.

params.name: topologyEdgeIndex
params.doc: An index of a topology edge in TopologyEdges.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the amount of edges in this list.
